mapper.select: SELECT item_id AS itemId, title, sales_type, service_type, local1, local2, local3, jibun_address AS jibunAddress, deposit, rent, manage_cost AS manageCost, manage_not_includes AS manageNotIncludes, area_m2 AS areaM2, area_contract_m2 AS areaContractM2, floor_level AS floorLevel, all_floors AS allFloors, lat, lng, options, subway, nb_distribution AS nbDistribution, nb_amenity AS nbAmenity, nb_poi, item_image FROM property where item_id=#{itemId}

SELECT item_id AS itemId, title, sales_type, service_type, local1, local2, local3, jibun_address AS jibunAddress, deposit, rent, manage_cost AS manageCost, manage_not_includes AS manageNotIncludes, area_m2 AS areaM2, area_contract_m2 AS areaContractM2, floor_level AS floorLevel, all_floors AS allFloors, lat, lng, options, subway, nb_distribution AS nbDistribution, nb_amenity AS nbAmenity, nb_poi, item_image FROM property order by itemId desc LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
select distinct local1 from region order by 1
select distinct local2 from region where local1=#{local1} order by 1
select distinct local3 from region where local1=#{local1} and local2=#{local2} order by 1
